scripts.build: npm --workspace @advaita/shared run build && npm --workspace @advaita/broker run build && npm --workspace @advaita/pi-package run build --if-present && npm --workspace @nickkarpov/advaita run build --if-present && npm --workspace @advaita/integration-tests run build --if-present
scripts.test: npm --workspace @advaita/shared run build && npm --workspace @advaita/shared run test && npm --workspace @advaita/broker run test && npm --workspace @advaita/pi-package run test --if-present && npm --workspace @nickkarpov/advaita run test --if-present && npm --workspace @advaita/integration-tests run test --if-present
scripts.clean: find packages -type d -name dist -prune -exec rm -rf {} + ; find packages -type d -name coverage -prune -exec rm -rf {} +
